meta.title: Why Claude Code Forgets Your Project Every Day (And the One File That Fixes It)

scenes.voiceover: You open Claude Code for the hundredth time. You explain your folder structure again.
scenes.spokenText: You open Claude Code for the hundredth time. You explain your folder structure again.

scenes.voiceover: I tracked this for 30 days across 3 projects. Five minutes lost every single session.
scenes.spokenText: I tracked this for 30 days across 3 projects. Five minutes lost every single session.

scenes.voiceover: But there is a file that fixes this. CLAUDE.md. A single markdown file in your project root.
scenes.spokenText: But there is a file that fixes this. CLAUDE.md. A single markdown file in your project root.

scenes.voiceover: After 30 days, setup time dropped to 30 seconds. The file grew from 10 lines to over 200.
scenes.spokenText: After 30 days, setup time dropped to 30 seconds. The file grew from 10 lines to over 200.

scenes.voiceover: Create a CLAUDE.md in your project root today. Start with your folder structure and conventions.
scenes.spokenText: Create a CLAUDE.md in your project root today. Start with your folder structure and conventions.
